action_items.action: COMPLETE STRATEGY REPORT FOR COLIN — Promised by COB today (Mon 18/05). Sections still outstanding: prediction markets, non-gambling opportunities, and recommendations. Mike shared the WIP on Confluence (https://gdcgroup.atlassian.net/wiki/x/KwUwigE) on Friday 15/05. Colin acknowledged and noted 'will have a read later' and confirmed outstanding items. Complete and share with Colin before end of day.

REVIEW GDCU-8981 FIREBASE MIGRATION (Carlos Blauth, In Product, updated 15/05) — GDCU-8982 Cosmo Spins package rename is now DONE (15/05), which was the blocking dependency for this ticket. Carlos can now run `flutterfire configure` for the new cosmo-spins-prod Firebase project. Review and approve so Carlos can proceed. APNs key upload may remain deferred until GDCU-8969 (Apple dev accounts) is resolved.

REVIEW GDCU-8902 SPORTS QUIZ DESIGN SYSTEM (Jessica Dordevic, In Product, updated 15/05) — Jessica has audited the Sports Quiz Hub Vercel prototype against the GDC design system and produced Claude Code prompts for iteration. Review and approve (or feedback) before the 14:00 Design Team Sync so Jessica has a clear direction.

REVIEW GDCU-8927 TABS COMPONENT IMAGE FIELDS (Harden Wallace, In Product, updated 15/05) — Genesis added image and alt-text fields to the Tabs component. Harden has integrated them. Review and approve across horizontal, vertical, and collapsible variations. UX support note in ticket: confirm image size restrictions/guidance have been addressed.

REVIEW GDCU-8971 HOW-TO VIDEOS — COSMO SPINS RESKIN (Novica Vukobratovic, In Product, updated 14/05) — Novica has created knowledge-sharing videos documenting how to reskin Cosmo Spins games and banners. Review and approve so the team can use them. Stakeholders: Eoin, Joshua, Gabriel, Kelvin.

GROUP BETS DESIGN — CONFIRM FRIDAY CHANGES DONE (Miguel). On 15/05 Mike asked Miguel to: (1) switch all euro signs to pounds, (2) remove the /72 from the Group Bets design. Confirm in the 10:30 Mike/Mig Catch Up that both changes are made. If done, consider scheduling the KO call with Chloe Christie to kick off dev (11 June hard deadline).

JESSICA DORDEVIC — LINKEDIN RECOMMENDATION + HR CHECK. On 14/05 Jessica asked Mike for a LinkedIn recommendation. Mike replied 'I don't have a problem but I need to check with HR first.' Jessica is in a redundancy consultation process. Chase HR today for a steer on the recommendation. Then reply to Jessica. Sensitive — be thoughtful about timing and tone given the consultation period.

VIC DADSON — RETURN PLAN. Vic came back from sick leave on 12/05 (hospital appointment). Colin has advised (15/05 20:10) 'I wouldn't rely on getting much from Vic between now and the next few weeks fwiw. Safer to utilise David as much as we can here.' Plan: (1) Continue routing analytics requests to David Mulero Pino. (2) Before Vic's departure, ensure she documents everything — full brain dump on tracking setup, data sources, KPI definitions. (3) Agree a departure handover plan with Colin.

WC PREDICTOR BANNERS V2 (Ciara) — CONFIRM OPTION 1 IN PROGRESS. On 15/05 17:23 Mike chose option 1 for in-game messaging. Ciara confirmed. Verify this is actioned during the 10:00 Monday Sync and that no further decisions are needed from Mike to unblock progress.

GDCU-8619 OPERATOR LIST REDESIGN (Ciara Carroll, High, In Progress) — Check progress during Monday Sync (10:00). Delivery of 3 distinct grid-format iterations required. Updated 14/05 — confirm timeline and whether any design direction input is needed from Mike before dev handoff.
